programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: An action-packed retelling of the classic legend, filled with thrilling battle sequences and epic adventure.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Five teenagers, infused with superhuman abilities, must harness their newfound powers to battle alien invaders

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Caught between the worlds of the supernatural and human, Hellboy battles an ancient sorceress bent on revenge.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A man from another world crash lands on Earth during the age of the Vikings.

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: Odessa Carter (Whoopi Goldberg) needs to get to work as a nanny in the home of the affluent Miriam Thompson (Sissy Spacek), but she refuses to take the bus. Odessa is participating in the Montgomery bus boycott, protesting against the inequality between blacks and whites, so Miriam decides to offer Odessa a ride to work every day. Though the community and Miriam's husband (Dwight Schultz) insist she not get involved, the relationship between Miriam and Odessa has already changed for the better.

programme.title: Eye See You
programme.desc: Recovering from the psychological effects of witnessing a brutal crime, FBI Agent Jake Malloy (Sylvester Stallone) checks into a rehabilitation clinic for law enforcement officers in the remote wilderness of Wyoming during the dead of winter. He soon finds himself helping other patients as a serial killer begins killing them one by one.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: As a mercenary, John Seeger (Steven Seagal) has a reputation that precedes him. That's why he's being blackmailed into performing a risky job: breaking the son of a wealthy arms dealer out of a South African prison. With his friends taken hostage, Seeger agrees to do the deed -- but finds out too late that he's been double-crossed. Not one who likes being taken for a fool, Seeger hatches an elaborate plan to get even that will make the prison break look like capture the flag.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Watership Down
programme.desc: Hoping to escape destruction by human developers and save their community, a colony of rabbits, led by Hazel and Fiver, seek out a safe place to set up a new warren.

programme.title: Season Of The Witch
programme.desc: 14th-century knights transport a suspected witch to a monastery, where monks deduce that her powers.

programme.title: The Marksman
programme.desc: A rancher on the Arizona border becomes the unlikely defender of a young Mexican boy desperately fleeing the cartel assassins who've pursued him into the U.S.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber turns himself in.

programme.title: Chances Are
programme.desc: A reincarnated soul (Robert Downey, Jr.) falls in love with his widow (Cybill Shepherd) 25 years after his death.

programme.title: Crossroads
programme.desc: One was a living legend, the other was just starting out... for both, the turning point will come at the Crossroads. Edited for TV

programme.title: Fire on the Mountain
programme.desc: The story of one man's defiance of the United States government. The hero, John Vogelin, is an old rancher.

programme.title: The Shadow Riders
programme.desc: Two brothers return home at the end of the war to find their family has been kidnapped by Confederate forces.

programme.title: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Emotional powerhouse stars Tom Hanks and Denzel Washington as competing lawyers who sue a prestigious law firm for AIDS discrimination.

programme.title: First Comes Courage
programme.desc: A Norwegian underground agent seeks valuable wartime intelligence by wooing a Nazi officer.

programme.title: Our Wife
programme.desc: A self-pitying, drunken composer finds inspiration in a new woman only to have his ex-wife decide that she now wants him back.

programme.title: First Men In The Moon
programme.desc: Spectacular adaptation of H. G. Well's novel of adventure and space travel.

programme.title: It Should Happen To You
programme.desc: A publicity-hungry actress uses a Manhattan billboard to jumpstart her career.

programme.title: Cat Ballou
programme.desc: In a spoof of Western pictures, the daughter of a rancher arrives home to find her father living under the threat of being killed unless he sells his ranch to a development corporation. He refuses and is killed. The daughter sends for Kid Shelleen, the hero of several legends, only the gunfighter has become a drunkard, but she teams up with him anyway to right the unjust murder of her father.

programme.title: Inland Empire
programme.desc: As an actress begins to adopt the persona of her character in a film, her world becomes nightmarish.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend [Subbed]
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: The Little Hours
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, a young servant fleeing from his master takes refuge at a convent full of emotionally unstable nuns. Introduced as a deaf mute man, he must fight to hold his cover as the nuns try to resist temptation.

programme.title: Hearts Beat Loud
programme.desc: A father and daughter form an unlikely songwriting duo in the summer before she leaves for college.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: When a gangster is injured by The Punisher, he swears revenge and recruits an army of dangerous men.

programme.title: Sisu
programme.desc: After Nazis steal his gold, an ex-commando will go to outrageous lengths to get it back.

programme.title: American Fighter
programme.desc: A young wrestler competes in the world of underground fighting to raise money for his ailing mother.

programme.title: Long Gone Heroes
programme.desc: A special forces soldier returns to the field of battle to save his kidnapped niece in South America.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: Pinkerton
programme.desc: Allan Pinkerton, founder of America's first detective agency, embarks on a mission to capture the notorious outlaw, Jesse James.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Shadow
programme.desc: To finally achieve victory over a rival kingdom, a brilliant general devises an intricate plan involving his wife, a look-alike and two kings.

programme.title: The Swordsman
programme.desc: A swordsman who is going blind is forced to raise his sword again to save his daughter, who has been kidnapped by a slave dealer.

programme.title: Preman: The Silent Fury
programme.desc: After his son witnesses a brutal murder by a notorious crime boss, a deaf Indonesian gangster is thrust into the fight of his life when he takes on his dangerous former allies to protect his child.

programme.title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil
programme.desc: A vengeful crime boss forms an unlikely partnership with a detective, to catch the elusive serial killer who attacked him.

programme.title: The Flying Swordsman
programme.desc: After two heroes are killed during an outside attempt to steal a hidden fortune, the treasure map inexplicably disappears -- until a decade later when the original eight assassins reemerge only to be challenged by a mysterious swordsman.

programme.title: My Mom's Letter From Heaven
programme.desc: A lost letter is found and helps the relationship between a father and daughter.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: Shortly after earning her degree at Northern Kentucky University.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica discovers that her son's biological father is her fertility doctor.

programme.title: My Nightmare Office Affair
programme.desc: Lisa seduces Nick in his moment of weakness, hoping to replace his wife.

programme.title: My Mom's Letter From Heaven
programme.desc: A lost letter is found and helps the relationship between a father and daughter.

programme.title: Falling For the Competition
programme.desc: A local mom’s and dad’s group clash for the prestigious Modern Parenting Group of the Year award.

programme.title: Cradle of Lies
programme.desc: Marissa was in a coma while pregnant and wakes up five years later to find that the baby she delivered is gone

programme.title: Candid About Love
programme.desc: Laura must get reclusive artist Shane to premiere his work at a gallery to help her own career.

programme.title: You, Me, and that Mountain Retreat
programme.desc: Partnered with nature-hating Nathan, Rebecca is put to the test during a work mountain retreat.

programme.title: How to Win a Prince
programme.desc: A chronically single dating coach attempts to seduce a prince as she helps him navigate the NYC dating scene.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Former Marine John "Falcon" Chapman is a dark anti-hero driven by guilt and suffering from PTSD, who will destroy himself unless given something else to destroy - a useful weapon-of-last-resort for the U.S. State Department.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: Traffickers
programme.desc: Tiffany Cooper, disgraced by the military, wanted by the cops and running out of time, stops at nothing to take down a Trafficking Operation and save these young girls. Nothing is what it seems when everyone seems to be against you. Trust No One.

programme.title: I'll Be There
programme.desc: More than a decade after distancing herself from her complicated family, Grace's carefully built life is upended when her brother AJ is diagnosed with cancer. As her estranged siblings reunite in Los Angeles, Grace is forced to confront old wounds, buried loyalties, and the role she once played in her fractured family-set against the surreal backdrop of Michael Jackson's death.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: The Barista
programme.desc: Brandon is a rising star in the podcast world. When he receives an on-air call from Paulette, a local barista, he soon learns that success comes at a price, as Paulette works to interject herself into a every aspect of his life, and sabotaging his success in the process in her ultimate goal to be his number one in all aspects of his life.

programme.title: Deceptive Touch
programme.desc: Cam believes she’s finally found “The One” in her charismatic boyfriend Ant. Everything seems perfect until a shocking discovery about Ant’s past threatens to unravel their idyllic life. As Cam digs for answers, passion turns into paranoia, and a twisted game of lies and manipulation threatens to destroy everything she thought she knew.

programme.title: Trapped in the Game: Fool Me Once
programme.desc: When FBI agent Dallas Bush is assigned to take down a powerful businessman turned drug lord, he realizes the payout could cover his dying mother’s medical expenses. Dallas must navigate a dangerous web of deception, crime, and moral compromise, where every choice comes with a price.

programme.title: The Princess Killers
programme.desc: Two friends take a chance to change their lives and become partners in the world of crime, and build reputations as strong, no nonsense, business women. They soon discover it’s lonely at the top, when their enemies close in on them, while maintaining their own friendship.

programme.title: Trouble
programme.desc: As Draven faces financial ruin and a serious illness, her marriage to Adam frays. She reconnects with Ceceilius, a wealthy ex, finding comfort in his stability. But as their romance blossoms, Adam’s jealousy spirals into a dangerous obsession, fueled by terrifying dreams and a mysterious woman, Robin. With a wedding on the horizon and secrets unraveling, love and betrayal collide, leading to a shocking conclusion where nothing is as it seems.

programme.title: Something Old
programme.desc: With her wedding days away, Kara agrees to meet her ex, Malik, for what she swears is just one last goodbye. But Malik isn’t looking for closure—he wants her back, and he’s not taking no for an answer. What starts as a simple meetup at a hotel turns into a dangerous game of obsession and control. As Kara’s fiancé Jordan uncovers the truth with help from her maid of honor, time’s running out.

programme.title: Planet Dune
programme.desc: A rescue mission on a desert planet turns deadly when they find the planet’s apex predators: giant sandworms.

programme.title: Dragon
programme.desc: A princess must recruit the most brave and powerful swordsmen to vanquish a dark wizard and his dragon.

programme.title: Dragonquest
programme.desc: A young hero must awaken a dragon to battle a legendary creature summoned by a warlord.

programme.title: 100 Million BC
programme.desc: Time-traveling scientists inadvertently bring a giant carnivorous dinosaur back to modern Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Terminators
programme.desc: A small band of resistance fighters battle the cyborgs that have taken control of the planet.

programme.title: Creeping Death
programme.desc: Halloween was always Tims favorite holidayuntil his mother was diagnosed with brain cancer. Now, all he wants is a quiet night in. That is quickly disrupted when his friends pay him an unwanted visit, after stealing a mysterious sack from the doorstep of a local crazy. This sacrilegious act unleashes the Aos Si, a Celtic spirit that walks the Earth on Halloween. They must band together and survive the night or make the ultimate offeringtheir lives--this Halloween, all who trick are treats.

programme.title: Camp Cold Brook (Edited Version)
programme.desc: TV producer Jack Wilson (Chad Michael Murray) fears his paranormal reality show will be cancelled. Desperate to increase the ratings, Wilson takes his filming crew out to investigate the legendary Camp Cold Brook--an abandoned summer camp where a mass murder had taken place decades ago. They soon realize they are not alone

programme.title: The Bride with White Hair II
programme.desc: On Kit and Lyre's wedding night, Lien Ni-Chang, the bride with white hair kidnaps Lyre and takes her to her harem of fighting women to indoctrinate her against Kit. Kit tries to lead a rescue party and go up against the formidable enemies.

programme.title: BODY BAGS (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Body Bags is an anthology horror film made up of three stories bookended by a creepy morgue assistant played by John Carpenter himself. The first story, The Gas Station, features Robert Carradine as a serial killer, with cameos by Sam Raimi and Wes Craven. Hair follows Stacy Keach as he receives a botched hair transplant that infests him with an alien parasite, and Eye is another transplant story, this time featuring Mark Hamill as a baseball player who loses an eye in a car accident and receives a transplant, only to be overtaken with the personality of the eye's previous owner: a murderous misogynist.

programme.title: Camp Cold Brook (Edited Version)
programme.desc: TV producer Jack Wilson (Chad Michael Murray) fears his paranormal reality show will be cancelled. Desperate to increase the ratings, Wilson takes his filming crew out to investigate the legendary Camp Cold Brook--an abandoned summer camp where a mass murder had taken place decades ago. They soon realize they are not alone

programme.title: The Reckoning
programme.desc: Thrown in jail after being falsely accused of being a witch, Grace must endure extreme physical persecution at the hands of a ruthless witch hunter.

programme.title: The Wretched
programme.desc: A rebellious teenage boy embarks on a gutsy crusade to stop the terrifying evil he suspects has possessed his neighbor in this bone-chilling occult thriller.

programme.title: The Midnight Man
programme.desc: It was supposed to be just an urban legend... Two teens unleash a demonic force who pits them against their greatest fears and dares them to survive his unholy game. Starring Robert Englund.

programme.title: From Black
programme.desc: A recovering drug addict, saddled by crushing guilt after the disappearance of her young son, is presented with a bizarre offer to learn the truth about what happened and set things right.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: Yodelin' Kid from Pine Ridge
programme.desc: Cowboy icon Gene Autry is framed for murder in this tale of warring cattlemen and turpentiners. The music driven western from director Joseph Kane (Flame of Barbary Coast) includes such familiar faces as Smiley Burnette, Charles Middleton, and Betty Bronson. In between gunshots you'll hear plenty of traditional cowboy songs, including She'll Be Coming 'Round The Mountain, and Red River Valley, plus Gene's version of Sing Me a Song of the Saddle.

programme.title: Frontier Justice

McGowan was the man behind several of the classic Our Gang comedies...

programme.title: Young Buffalo Bill
programme.desc: Roy Rogers stars in this highly fictionalized account of Bill Cody's life from director Joseph Kane (Dakota, Flame of Barbary Coast). programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall tackles a Fan Fridge from a viewer in Ohio, transforming ground beef, mashed potatoes, and pantry staples into a warming Shepherd's Pie-inspired casserole layered with sautÈed vegetables and finished with a cheesy potato topping. The hosts weave in a thoughtful conversation about grace, kindness to strangers, and the community spirit of how neighborhoods once raised children together.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon each take a third of the same chocolate sheet cake and decorate it their own way, creating three wildly different showstopping desserts in one episode. Clinton goes peanut butter, Carla goes Black Forest-inspired with sour cherry, and Michael goes coconut ganache ó proving that one bake can launch a thousand creative directions.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his beloved Mini Marsala Meatballs, mixing beef and pork with breadcrumbs soaked in milk and browning them until golden before finishing them in a rich marsala-mushroom sauce. The hosts discuss proper meatball technique, family traditions around Sunday gravy, and the surprising versatility of marsala wine in savory cooking.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly makes his beloved Tuscan White Bean Stew with chicken sausage, onions, and celery while welcoming sports broadcaster Marysol Castro ó the first female and Latina PA announcer for the New York Mets ó as a special guest. Bean Week reaches its emotional peak as the hosts discuss baseball basics, recent life milestones, and the deeply satisfying power of a vegetable-forward winter meal.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall makes a warmly spiced Moroccan Apple Crumble with dates, cardamom, and cinnamon, building a simple crumble topping using a foolproof ratio formula and serving it with a dollop of cr√ãme fra√ìche for an elegant finish. The hosts discuss the art of checking doneness by eye rather than timer, date farming in California, and Carla's personal decision to embrace her natural gray hair.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall kicks off Bean Week with her Black Bean Empanadas, stuffing golden, flaky pastry shells with a richly seasoned black bean filling that proves legumes can be just as craveable as meat. The hosts celebrate the internet's enthusiastic response to Clinton's Bean Week proposal and dive into the week with maximum enthusiasm.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his deeply satisfying Pasta e Fagioli during Bean Week, building a thick, soul-warming pasta and bean soup that he considers one of the greatest cold-weather dishes ever conceived. The hosts debate the pronunciation of Italian words in Italian-American households and celebrate the cultural heritage behind this Roman classic.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Bean Week reaches its triumphant finale as Clinton Kelly makes a Chickpea Pasta and Chocolate Chip Cookies while a special musical surprise celebrates Carla Hall's lifelong dream of being honored Broadway-style. The hosts reflect on Bean Week's unexpected viral success and welcome a composer to help mark the occasion.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes Super Bowl Smash Burgers inspired by Carla Hall's hilarious hotel window-smashing incident the night before, breaking down his technique for maximum crust, cheese lace, and game-day efficiency. The hosts debate double-bun etiquette, share tips on underrated herbs, and tackle fan questions about making the most of a large Parmesan wedge.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off Super Bowl week ó his unambiguously favorite week of the year ó by making Smash Burgers with crispy seared edges, while Carla Hall makes Ham and Cheese Croquettes with sweet chili Doritos for extra crunch. Guest Josh Capon brings his expert restaurant energy to the game day kitchen.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Super Bowl week continues as Carla Hall makes her show-stopping Baked Brie wrapped in flaky puff pastry with honey and nuts, which Clinton defends as the real MVP of any game day spread. The hosts debate the ideal balance between indulgent party food and something a little elegant, and share their best game day hosting strategies.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Matt Sese" - Matt Sese, personal trainer and operator of the Row DTLA community gym comes by the temporary studio for a meal from Dave.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Garrett Leight" - Eyewear entreprenuer and Row DTLA neighbor Garrett Leight comes to the temporary studio as Dave attempts to create a meal inspired by Garrett's Mexican American and Jewish heritage.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: Dave turns the tables on Kat and John, as he cooks a special meal for the married couple behind the sensational LA-based restaurant Yangban Society.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "Ratatouille Tarte Tatin" - Chris Ying creates a beautiful ratatouille tarte Tatin, motivated by a combination of online influences, including an on-the-fly challenge from his buddy David Chang while they were making chicken pot pie together in a different video. Chris riffs on the popular trend zipping around social media to make tarte Tatin (typically a sweet pastry) while paying homage to recipe YouTuber extraordinaire, Andrew Rea (Binging with Babish), who's first mega-popular video was recreating the ratatouille from...Ratatouille.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "WTF is BORG and Can a Mixologist Make it Good?" - Professional bartender, mixologist and author, John deBary, joins Chris Ying to figure out why all the college kids are going bonkers over a viral drink trend called BORG (Black Out Rage Gallon). Yikes! Is it any good? Are the kids maybe onto something here? Can John come up with a recipe that elevates it from the bottom shelf to...a slightly higher shelf? We feel old.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "A Complete Christmas Roast Beef Dinner" - The internet is full of people advertising their recipes for affordable! simple! budget-buster! Christmas dinners. But just because you want to save some money and not break your back making dinner doesn't mean you don't want something festive and celebratory. Chris Ying is here to light the way to a full Christmas dinner—roast beef, horseradish cream, creamed spinach, baked potatoes, Yorkshire pudding—for under $50. Nothing hacky or gimmick-y about it. Just a good old-fashioned heart-warming holiday dinner from Colonel Christmas himself.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Embark on a captivating history of Machias, Maine and the first naval battle of the Revolutionary War. Gain insight into the region's sustainable practices and the symbiotic relationship between the land and sea. Inspired by the local bounty, Chef Staib creates mouthwatering recipes that celebrate this remarkable coastal town.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Travel to Old Fort Harrod in Harrodsburg, Kentucky to explore the history of the fort and life of James Harrod. Joined by Mary Barlow, Chef Walter Staib pays tribute to the culinary heritage in the George Rogers Clark Cabin, they prepare historic recipes including a Kentucky Elk roast and a delightful Stack Cake, showcasing the traditional flavors of the region.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib takes a journey Down Under to Sydney, Australia, where he learns of the regenerative techniques Australian Farmers use to create delicious-tasting Beef and support a sustainable future for the planet. Get ready for a sizzling adventure that celebrates the flavors of Australia in true "Barbie" style!

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Join Chef Staib on a flavorful journey through Melbourne, Australia, as he dives into the vibrant culinary scene of this multicultural city. From meeting talented local chefs to uncovering the source of Australian lamb in the countryside, experience the diverse flavors and cultural pulse that make Melbourne a true food lover's paradise.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib explores Delaware's pivotal role in American history while savoring mouthwatering dishes like Spicy Corn Relish, Stewed Codfish, and Macaroons. Discover how Delaware's small but significant contributions helped shape American culture and politics, from its early Dutch and Swedish settlements to its crucial involvement in the Revolutionary War.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib travels into the heart of Oaxaca, Mexico to embark on a captivating journey that uncovers the art of Mezcal making, guided by local experts who reveal the secrets behind this beloved spirit. The mysteries of the ancient city of Monte Albán await discovery, while renowned Mexican Chef, Rodolfo Castellanos showcases the vibrant flavors of the central market's local cuisine.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Join us on a spirited journey as we explore the rich history of Applejack and Apple Brandy, discovering their colonial origins and witnessing the meticulous distillation process at America's oldest distillery. Chef Walter Staib returns to the historic Harriton House to fire up some apple-inspired recipes, including Scallopini of Pork with Stuffing, a sizzling Apple Flambé, and more.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Steak. It offers an irrefutable argument for simplicity, but it can also be the perfect foil for all the rubs, marinades, butters, and sauces you can throw at it. It’s easy to grill, but takes a lifetime to perfect. Let’s take a look back on how steak has evolved through three iconic TV series: Primal Grill, Project Smoke, and Project Fire.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: In Miami, our food culture is firmly anchored in Latin America and the West Indies. Our Miami Spice menu begins with a Project Fire first: the grilled mojito cocktail. Next comes Florida lobster grilled with rum butter baste and mango salsa, then plate-burying island spice beef plate ribs. Our grand finale? Turkey adobo with garlicky mojo de ajo.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Chino-Latino originated with Chinese laborers who immigrated to Cuba, Trinidad, and elsewhere in the Caribbean to work the plantations. They developed a unique mashup of Asian and West Indian cooking—the subject of today’s show. Get ready for tangerine teriyaki chicken, butter rum grilled plantains, smoky baby back ribs with guava barbecue sauce, and Korean brisket tacos.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Steinhatchee, Florida, with seafood-rich grilling of the Gulf Coast. Blackened redfish that we’ll prepare “on the half shell”, to the Florida shrimp boil, deconstructed and flame-charred on the grill. And, yes, there will be oysters and clams—invigorated by the sweet scent of wood smoke. Explore one of the most colorful coastal regions in North America.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Today, we’re grilling green with vegetables we love like asparagus, corn, and mushrooms. Celebrate meatless grilling in all its verdant glory. From a new egg salad with grilled fresh hearts of palm, to a squash, black bean, and queso fresco pizza you grill directly over the fire. And grilled cheese with portobello mushrooms served in a swirl of blazing cognac.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: How about upping your grill game with steaks you may not be familiar with, such as secreto or spinalis dorsi? Secreto is a hyper-flavorful steak cut from a hog’s belly with a grilled vegetable sauce, romesco. Spinalis dorsi the most delectable part of a rib roast reborn as a steak, and grilled with bourbon. And grill a brisket steak fragrant with sizzling shallot sage butter.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: In today’s show, Texas barbecue meets Mexican spice as we explore how American barbecue techniques can enhance three classic Mexican dishes: snapper in pipian in a grilled vegetable and pumpkin seed sauce, pork shoulder pibil smoke-roasted in banana leaves, and a Project Fire first, a dessert quesadilla lavished with bananas and dulce de leche.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A toddler in South Korea named Ha-Jun has a cold but doesn't like the taste of the medicine that his Dad needs to give him. Ha-Jun's sister Yuna calls the Super Wings for help. A boy named Geir in Iceland goes with his Mom on a tour to see arctic foxes in their natural habitat. Geir orders an arctic fox costume to wear so the shy foxes will come out of their caves and meet him.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a huge inflatable sword to Neele, an accessory for the balloon version of the legendary dragon-fighter Siegfried she is flying with her Papa in the annual balloon festival. Fabio loves soccer but he is not interested in history. At the San Augustin Archeological Park, he accidentally drops his ball into one of the sites with many ancient statues! Jett delivers him a stretchy claw.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a girl named Alani notices that the sea level is rising around the island of Tuvalu she orders a huge lifeboat for all the people in her village to ride on. Jett finds himself stuck in ice in Antarctica courtesy of Golden Boy, Golden Wheels, and a giant Golden Robot. He is rescued by World Aircraft and learns that Golden Boy has caused lots of global warming problems around the planet.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A passenger airplane bound for Italy has to make an emergency landing on World Aircraft. When Lime offers to prepare a meal for the passengers, Mano, a young boy passenger, makes a popular suggestion: pizza! Ratu and his Dad are excited about a "survival challenge" on one of Fiji's Desert Islands, but they forgot to bring their survival guide to teach them how to filter water!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers flowery mooncakes to Meilin, a young girl who wants to celebrate the Mid-Autumn Festival by leaving a gift for the Moon Lady, who is said to descend from the moon according to Chinese folklore. A girl named Emma lives in Transinne, Belgium and she asks the Super Wings if they can help her with her solar system school project.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Astra and Rover continue to help Emma, her Dad, and spaceship Rick see the solar system. Trouble is Golden Boy and Golden Wheels tag along! Jett delivers a claw grabber to Marcia, a little girl playing a treasure hunt game in which she searches for hidden treasure notes in the Rio Abiseo National Park in Peru. Our Super Wing helps her in her search!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets encounter three pandas on a country road in Chengdu, China. They try to help get the pandas off the highway and back to the panda centre. A girl asks the Super Wings for help in locating a dolphin in the waters off Iceland. Jett and Paul deliver a sonar device that can track dolphin whistles.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a princess's dogs need to attend training school she worries that they're too playful to pass. Jett and Donnie deliver some special training suits to help them succeed. When the Super Pets accidentally knock down a birthday piñata at a house outside of Mexico City, Jett and Jerome deliver a huge piñata replacement for the boy's party.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets visit Pisa, Italy where some street cats have made a mess spilling recycling bins. Jett and a new Super Wing called Shine deliver tongs and help with the clean up. The Super Pets are in Pohang, South Korea where they meet a girl whose robot is in need of repairs. Jett and Jerome deliver a much needed repair kit and some robot dance lessons!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets meet a boy in the Serengeti National Park whose ball rolls into an ostrich nest. The mother ostrich thinks the ball is one of her eggs and won't give it back. When a hippo gets stuck on a waterslide at a community swimming pool in Kenya, a boy calls on the Super Wings to deliver a hippo-sized life ring to help free it.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers winter clothes to a little girl living in Egypt's Sahara Desert where a cold snap has left the desert snowy. Jett and Astra show her how to enjoy the snow. After the Super Pets accidentally knock down some Turkish rugs in an Istanbul market, Jett and Ellie deliver a magic lamp that can summon two genies.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy, Kima, and his Dad are trekking through the Himalaya mountains in Nepal. The Super Wings bring an LED torch to help them. Trouble strikes when a baby yeti startles them. Vo, the Mars rover, is celebrating his birthday but misses his friend Catalina. Jett and Astra come to the rescue and promise to bring Catalina and her ginormous gift to Mars.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: For Children's Day, Wang Min's Dad has invited his son and his classmates to visit his toy factory. While cleaning up before the visit, a robot toy goes on a rampage. The Super Pets encounter an itchy lion at a sanctuary in South Africa. Jett and Astra deliver a back scratcher, but the lion's itchiness is stronger than they realized!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets go into a video game arcade and play a video game called Dessert Kingdom. They are watched by a boy named Yoonho and they decide to go into the game itself. When the Super Pets unearth a woolly mammoth, a Nenets boy wants to keep it. The mammoth must be able to pull a sleigh so Jett and Dizzy deliver a mammoth size sleigh.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a T-Rex skeleton on display in a Copenhagen museum is brought to life, a boy orders a remote controller to summon a giant robot T-Rex that he built to help calm it. Jett and the others arrive in the Jurassic Period to return Tyranno to her proper place in time. A volcano erupts throwing fireballs everywhere and causing a dinosaur stampede.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets spend a day at a Pet Hotel in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. The daughter of the hotel owner gets help from the Super Wings to keep them well behaved. After the Jet Pets' Mini Base collides with a small comet, Jett and Astra rush a space scanner to a young boy and together and the three search space for the small 'Baba' comet.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: It's Jett's birthday and almost all of his friends are throwing him a big birthday party! Sky sends Donnie, Paul, and Dizzy out on missions and nobody is left at Jett's party. When the truck transporting race cars gets lost, Jett, Jerome and Dizzy show up in Monza, Italy to take part in a very special Super Wings race against Golden Boy.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: While in Thailand, Jett Pet and Paul Pet's fruit is swiped by a monkey. Thanawat asks for help getting his toys back so they create an LED ball with a tracking system. The Super Pets travel to Madrid, Spain where they help a boy secure a case for his pet tarantula to ride the train. However an accident causes his tarantula to become super-sized!

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that; the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby Lullaby takes your baby on a soothing journey with classical lullabies by Bach, Brahms and Mozart. Enjoy relaxing ocean waves, sweet puppet shows and tranquil images. From fun time to rest time, Baby Lullaby is the perfect way to spend special time with your baby.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover instruments through narration and repetition. Real-life images and sounds will engage viewers as they dance to upbeat classical favorites from Beethoven, Mozart and more. Join your favorite Baby Einstein characters to discover what makes each instrument unique!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Get moving with Baby Einstein! Real, live-action footage and classical melodies engage young viewers as they discover simple words related to movement. Enjoy encouraging melodies and live-action footage of babies and animals as you learn and move alongside your favorite Baby Einstein friends. Dance along as you watch real, live action footage of animals, children, and toys.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Humpty Dumpty & More Kids Videos - Bob The Train
programme.desc: Enjoy Bob the train popular easy to learn nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers, which the children love to sing and dance along with. Learn these kids songs and new words at the same time. Learn about animal sounds, shapes, phonics, numbers, abc, colors, alphabets,123 and more made easy and fun with this preschool playlist.

programme.title: Bob the Train - Learning Alphabets & More Preschools Videos for Kids
programme.desc: Learning Alphabets with Bob the train is alway a fun, bob make learning so easy and interesting for you kids. Watch this videos and enjoy your preschools learning videos like shapes, numbers, vegetable, names, transport and many more.

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star & More Kids Songs - Bob The Train
programme.desc: Enjoy Bob the Train's nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers! Learn about animal sounds, shapes, and more!

programme.title: Baby Shark & More Kids Songs by Bob The Train
programme.desc: Let's dance to the Baby Shark song!! Come join Bob the train in his preschool nursery rhymes & kids songs for babies & toddlers like balloon song, no no song, five little babies, bath song, this is the way, rain rain go away, incy wincy spider, johny johny, humpty dumpty, rig a jig jig, zoo song, wheels on the bus, pat a cake, ten in the bed, three little kittens, and more baby songs.

programme.title: Wheels on the bus Nursery Rhyme and Kids Songs - Bob The Train
programme.desc: Enjoy Bob the Train's nursery rhymes which children love. Learn songs and new words at the same time.

programme.title: Bob the Train - Non Stop
programme.desc: Kids educational songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join bob the train as he sings, dances in this fun kids learning video. Learn about alphabets, fruits, planets, phonics, numbers, abc, shapes, colors, 123 and more made easy and fun with this preschool rhymes and kids songs playlist.

programme.title: Bob the Train - Halloween Videos For Kids
programme.desc: Come celebrate halloween with your friend Bob the Train!

programme.title: Learn Planets Songs, Abc, Colors, Numbers, Shapes - Bob The Train - Movie
programme.desc: Kids songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join Bob the train as he sings, dances in this fun kids learning video. Learn about planets, phonics, numbers, abc, shapes, colors, alphabets, 123 and more made easy and fun with this preschool nursery rhymes and kids songs playlist.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Rumor has it that Queen Aleena's journals are buried in the city of Tashistan. Sonic and his siblings search the city for the scrolls.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia is invited to a debutante ball, but before she can be officially announced to society, she and her brothers, Manic and Sonic have an important mission.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs find out that Sonia has inherited a castle. She basks in the idea of having a castle for headquarters.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs steal historical artifacts of Mobuis from Robotnik before he can pawn them off at an auction.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: In order to free Sketch Lampoon (a satirical comic book artist) from Robotnik's new high security prison, Sonic allows himself to be captured, then makes a high speed rescue and escape.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Tails gets trapped in the "Warp of Confusion" (an Escher-like world of another dimension) by Robotnik's cousin, Dr. Warpnik, Sonic comes to the rescue and traps Robotnik and his badniks in the warp.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails befriend a pair of aliens who crash land their spaceship on Mobius. Sonic has to avoid Robotnik's ULTRA-GRAVITIZER (sort of a hedgehog flypaper) to help fix their ship and blast-off back home.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Coconuts is exiled by Robotnik to a remote jungle, where he uses a giant baby ape to destroy villages. But Sonic exposes Coconuts as a robot, and the baby ape's real Dad takes Coconuts and the baby ape away for a spanking.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: A fast talking, travelling salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik various hedgehog-catching gadgets, including the Darkenator, the Super-duper Gravity Stopper, and the De-Atomizer.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic rescues Lucas, a rival of Robotnik's, from Robotnik's dungeons. But Robotnik will do anything to keep Lucas from finding his lost love, Lucinda, including proposing to her himself.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Big Griz, leader of a group of biker-bear rebels, mistakes Scratch and Grounder for Sonic and Tails, and teams up with S and G to attack the real Sonic and Tails.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Finding she has some free time one morning, Strawberry visits Berrykin Bloom who is filled with excitement over his new crop of Berry Bitty fruits and vegetables; his garden has never grown so much produce! He can't wait to share his new crop (the perfect bitty size) with Berry Bitty City, so Strawberry volunteers to help him transport the produce to Orange's General Store.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest; she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores-everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huck turn the Baby Berrykins' favorite fairy tale, "The Littlest Berrykin," into a comedy play. They pitch it to director Plum and the assembled cast and crew using a large storybook. As Huck and Blueberry narrate the story, we push in on the book and its illustrations transition into animation. In the story, the King and Queen of the Berry Patch (played by Huck and Blueberry) are retiring to the tropics.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Orange wants to spend the day teaching her puppy to fetch, but the frisky little gal doesn't seem to understand the "retrieve" part of the activity-as soon as she gets the ball, she runs out of sight and returns moments later without it. Orange gets a new ball and tries again, with the same results. Over and over, until Orange is out of balls. Puzzled and frustrated that she can't find where her pup has stashed them, she goes to enlist her friends to help her search.

programme.title: Rommel: The Soldier, The Son, and Hitler
programme.desc: ROMMEL: THE SOLDIER, THE SON, AND HITLER provides rare insight into the military career and personal life of Germany's most famous WWII commander, Field Marshal Erwin Rommel. Told from the perspective of Erwin's son Manfred, it is the story of what happens when a career soldier runs afoul of a dictator.Highly decorated and one of Hitler's favorite commanders in the early years of World War II, the Desert Fox, as his British adversaries labeled him, was somewhat of an enigma. Never a member of the Nazi party, Rommel detested the blending of politics and war. He would quickly discover that both were always in play in Hitler's Germany.Rommel was somewhat nave to Hitler's ways until the latter days of the Afrika Korps defeat in North Africa in 1943. By then, Rommel started to surmise that Germany's fate was sealed. In charge of the famed and flawed Atlantic Wall in western Europe in late 1943, Rommel tried his best to prepare France for the Allied invasion. In the end, it would not be enough. D-Day's success only reinforced Rommel's belief that Adolf Hitler should sue for peace in the west.It was an opinion that Hitler found treasonous.

programme.title: Cuba: The Forgotten Revolution
programme.desc: CUBA: THE FORGOTTEN REVOLUTION tells the virtually unknown story of Cuban revolutionaries Frank Pais and Juan Antonio Echeverria a school teacher and architecture student whose names seldom appear alongside their more famous contemporaries, Fidel Castro and Che Guevara. These young men, who worked independently from each other, played critical roles in the eventual overthrow of dictator Fulgencio Batista y Zaldva in 1950s Cuba.New scholarship and recently accessed footage challenge the prevailing view in part advanced by Che Guevara that Castro's army of 200 guerillas single-handedly defeated tens of thousands of Batista's professional soldiers and liberated the people of Cuba. In actuality, Pais and Echeverria's insurgencies in Santiago and Havana held the key to generating popular support for resistance and undermining the authority of Batista and his secret police. Both Pais and Echeverria rivaled Castro in popularity and power during the height of the Revolution, yet neither man lived to see the movement succeed. Pais was gunned down in the street and Echeverria died in a daring raid on the palace.The film highlights the complexities inherent in revolutions and examines the shaping (and reshaping) of the final historical record. After Castro assumed power in 1959, he harnessed the power of television to set forth a narrative that effectively removed Pais and Echeverria from the record. Through archival stock footage and exclusive interviews with Cuban revolution participants and observers, family members, people who fought alongside Castro and Guevara, and a former CIA agent, we learn about Cubas forgotten revolutionaries.

programme.title: Fannie's Last Supper
programme.desc: Join culinary expert Christopher Kimball and his team of test kitchen sleuths as they attempt to recreate an authentic turn-of-the-century 12-course dinner. For two years, Kimball painstakingly researched and tested recipes from The Boston Cooking School Cook Book, written in 1896 by Fannie Farmer. Tracking down unusual ingredients, discovering forgotten techniques and battling a finicky wood stove are just part of the fun as the pressure builds for the crew to pull off a perfectly-orchestrated meal for their distinguished guests.The project required the team, lead by head chef Erin McMurrin, to constantly regulate the heat on a cast-iron wood stove and work in the Victorian-era kitchen without the benefit of modern appliances. The courses they prepare include: rissoles (filled and fried puff pastry), mock turtle soup with fried brain balls, lobster lAmricaine, roast goose with chestnut stuffing and jus, wood-grilled salmon, roast saddle of venison, Canton punch, three molded Victorian jellies and a spectacular French-inspired Mandarin cake.This special details not only the cooking and serving of the dinner itself, but travels back in time to investigate the life of Fannie Farmer and the world of Victorian cooking, including the foods, the cookware, and the kitchens in an effort to connect the present to the past.

programme.title: The Misty Experiment: The Secret Battle for the Ho Chi Minh Trail
programme.desc: THE MISTY EXPERIMENT: THE SECRET BATTLE FOR THE HO CHI MINH TRAIL is an hour-long documentary that profiles a special U.S. Air Force squadron whose pilots volunteered for one of the wars most dangerous air missions. Their assignment: search for enemy supply transports and anti-aircraft installations concealed within the web of trail paths and waterways collectively known as the Ho Chi Minh Trail. The squadron also directed on-site rescue operations for U.S. and allied aircrews shot down while flying over the jungles of North Vietnam and Laos.The activities of Operation Commando Sabre, the official name of the mission, were classified as top secret during and immediately following the war. This documentary shares the story of the Misty squadron as told solely through the recollections of the veterans who volunteered for the mission. Their stories are enhanced by never-before-seen squadron footage and general archival combat footage from the war.

programme.title: The Tuskegee Airmen: Return to Ramitelli
programme.desc: THE TUSKEGEE AIRMEN: RETURN TO RAMITELLI tells the story of a legendary United States Air Force squadron comprised entirely of Black soldiers. Until 1941, Black soldiers in the U.S. military were considered unfit for service and were limited to positions as cooks and stewards. However, that all changed when the United States Department of War authorized the creation of an all-Black fighter unit known as the Tuskegee Airmen. The squadrons record of success would heavily contribute to the desegregation of the U.S. military only seven years after its formation.In this documentary, veteran Tuskegee Airmen return to visit the site of their operations in Ramitelli Italy. We experience their legacy through World War II-era footage, animated reenactments, and interviews with Tuskegee veterans and historians.

programme.title: Lifeline: Pearl Harbor's Unknown Hero
programme.desc: Narrated by actor Gary Sinise, LIFELINE: PEARL HARBOR'S UNKNOWN HERO tells the story of how U.S. Navy sailor Joe George became an unlikely hero when the Japanese attacked Pearl Harbor in Hawaii on December 7, 1941, and how he was recognized with a Bronze Medal for his actions more than 70 years later.A USS Vestal crewman, Joe was not your model navy sailor. He fought both inside and outside the boxing ring, liked his beer a little too much at times, and had a stubborn and defiant streak that often left him at odds with his superior officers and, once in a while, got him thrown in the brig. But on that Day of Infamy, Joe did something extraordinary. He became one of Americas first heroes of WWII.Ignoring a direct order to cut the lines from the USS Vestal, which was moored alongside the burning and sinking USS Arizona, the sailor made a crucial decision that saved six lives and impacted future generations. Joe could see that the crewmen were injured badly, trapped, waving, and pleading for help as fire raged on the Arizona's deck beneath them. He found a weighted heaving line and threw it toward the men, who secured the line. One by one, they began to crawl over to the USS Vestal, hand over hand, and more than 50 feet above the water, feeling the heat from the flames on their skin. More than a thousand Arizona crewmen died during the attack, with only 335 sailors surviving that day, including the six that Joe rescued.Joe was never recognized for his actions until the men he saved from the USS Arizona (Lauren Bruner and Donald Stratton) took it upon themselves to see he received the award he deserved. With the support of Stratton's son Randy, and George's daughter Joe Ann Taylor, the men of the USS Arizona took their mission all the way to the Oval Office, the Pentagon and Capitol Hill. They were determined to complete one final mission as USS Arizona crewmen.

programme.title: Grandpa's War Story Goes Viral
programme.desc: For Alaskan teenager Henry De Hoop, social media platforms such as Facebook have provided a unique opportunity to share the World War II story of his grandfather, James (Jim) Schmidt, with a global audience. Narrated by Liev Schreiber, GRANDPAS WAR STORY GOES VIRAL shares the remarkable account of Jims World War II service and military career, as well as Henrys efforts to generate interest in his grandfathers war journey and launch a letter-writing campaign on his behalf.Like 16 million others of his generation, Jim responded to the national call to duty following the bombing of Pearl Harbor in 1941. The twist in the story? Jim was only 14 when he enlisted, and the eighth-grade Californian left home without telling his parents. After being wounded in the invasion of Sicily, Jims age was eventually revealed and he was sent home. Not to be deterred, Jim would do stints in both the U.S. Navy and Merchant Marines before finally reaching 18 and officially rejoining the Army. Grandson Henry marveled that Jim joined the war effort at the same age he was when he first shared Jim's story on social media.GRANDPAS WAR JOURNEY GOES VIRAL charts a story of service that began in a movie theater in 1942 where the film Parachute Battalion grabbed a boys attention and ends in the jungles of Vietnam more than two decades later.
